pages:
Apex Freight Solutions Inc.
Operating Review | Digital Freight & Last-Mile Marketplace
Period: Q2 2025
Apex Freight Solutions Inc. ("Apex Freight") operates a digital freight and last-mile logistics marketplace connecting shippers with a
distributed network of carriers. Transaction-based revenue is supplemented by SaaS tool fees charged to enterprise shipper
accounts. This report is the first issued under the Apex Freight Solutions Inc. corporate name, following the completion of our
rebrand from FleetLink Logistics Network, effective 1 April 2025.
Network & Volume Metrics
Metric Q2 2025
Completed Shipments 1.28M
Active Shippers 3,460
Active Carriers 7,900
On-Time Delivery Rate 96.1%
Average Take Rate 11.2%
Financial Summary
Metric Q2 2025
Recognized Revenue (transaction) 8.6M
SaaS Tool Fee Revenue 0.7M
Total Recognized Revenue 9.3M
Gross Margin 54%
Marketing Spend as % of Revenue 16%
Support Tickets / 1,000 Shipments 14.3
Total Headcount 204
Total Recognized Revenue reached 9.3M in Q2 2025, supported by a 9% increase in completed shipments and the first material
quarter of SaaS tool fee revenue (0.7M) from enterprise shipper accounts. Contribution margin per shipment improved to $2.30 as
Apex Freight reduced promotional incentives and improved carrier-side pricing discipline. Gross Margin expanded to 54%.
Non-Recurring Items
- One-time warehouse exit cost: 0.6M (Q2 2025 only)
- Non-cash depreciation and amortisation: 0.9M
- Rebrand-related legal and design costs of 0.2M are included in Q2 2025 operating expenses and are not separately excluded
from Gross Margin.
(1) Apex Freight Solutions Inc. is the successor entity to FleetLink Logistics Network; all historical metrics referenced in this document relate to the
same operating business.

(2) Recognized Revenue (transaction) and SaaS Tool Fee Revenue are disclosed separately for the first time in Q2 2025.
(3) Contribution Margin per Shipment of $2.30 is discussed in commentary; not separately tabled.
(4) On-Time Delivery Rate is carrier-reported with a 48-hour grace window per service agreement.
